steps.t: One of the Boffins outside Prisca's house may know where Marigold has gone. You returned many of Prisca Boffin's children to her home, but Marigold Bo…
The Withywindle River runs through the middle of the Old Forest, and might be a good landmark to use in your search for Marigold Boffin.
You and Bingo have found Marigold Boffin in the Old Forest, along the banks of the Withywindle.
Marigold is excited to speak with you about Bingo's adventure. You and Bingo have found Marigold Boffin in the Old Forest, along the banks of the With…
A strange creature of the forest with yellow boots invited Marigold to his home to the north-east, and you should accompany her and make sure it is sa…
Marigold Boffin is outside Tom Bombadil's house in the Old Forest, north-east of the Withywindle River.
Bingo is outside Tom Bombadil's house in the Old Forest, north-east of the Withywindle River.
